problem: agent-rules has orchestration, memory, and MCP sensors but lacks reliable project-scoped memory isolation, unified perception/digest for brain maintenance, grounded idle creativity (Dreaming), and explicit Machine autonomy boundaries. Cross-project context can leak when .cursor is symlinked from clinical project roots.
solution: Implement The Machine architecture: workspace scope resolver, per-project memory DB, conscious cross-project search MCP tool, weekly brain digest (arXiv + GitHub AI + AI news), Dreaming Daemon MVP, autonomy rule, Primary/Secondary routing doc, and expanded soul.md identity.

user_stories.description: Hooks resolve correct project workspace root when .cursor is symlinked from a clinical project folder.
project_init writes .agent/project_scope.json with stable scope slug for the project folder.
Automatic memory injection never includes observations from a different project_scope.
MCP search_cross_project(query, limit) returns hits across all scopes; hooks never invoke it.
MEMORY.md fallback injection is disabled or scoped; no unfiltered cross-project tail inject.
Weekly arXiv scan mode writes arxiv_scan_YYYY-WW.json in brain repo.
github_ai_watch.py monitors AI/agent repos and writes github_ai_watch_YYYY-WW.json.
ai_news_feed.py aggregates configured RSS feeds into ai_news_YYYY-WW.json.
machine_weekly_digest.py produces machine_digest_YYYY-WW.md with upgrade proposals mapped to changelog.
dreaming_daemon.py builds framework markdown in .agent/dreaming/frameworks/ with source_ref on every premise.
machine-autonomy.mdc codifies allowed/forbidden autonomous actions and changelog duty.
Primary/Secondary relevance routing defined in MACHINE_PRIMARY_SECONDARY.md and wired in orchestrator.
soul.md expanded with Machine identity, honesty protocol, and collaboration defaults.

technical_decisions.decision: One memory.db per resolved WORKSPACE_ROOT; brain repo scope slug agent-rules.
technical_decisions.rationale: Prevents cross-project bleed while allowing brain-only maintenance memory.

technical_decisions.decision: workspace_scope.py shared by hooks, memory_engine/config, handoff_server.
technical_decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for root and scope resolution.

technical_decisions.decision: Weekly digest runs only in agent-rules brain repo via Task Scheduler scripts.
Sensors use Python scripts + public APIs/RSS; no new MCP servers in v1.

execution_chain.notes: Machine upgrade v1 complete 2026-06-29; iterate via weekly digest proposals.

baseline_vs_steered.notes: pytest memory_engine 19 passed; scoped inject regression + cross_project test.
